stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct about a flight crew oxygen mask?

options.a: Below a certain altitude the oxygen mask switches automatically to “constant flow”.
options.b: In the position “100%” oxygen is always supplied with some overpressure.
options.c: When selected to the position “EMERGENCY” oxygen is always supplied with some overpressure.
options.d: In the position “DILUTE” oxygen supply is from a special bottle containing diluted oxygen.
